base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of koopas_masked_koopas — a character (playable) from 1990 super mario world. Koopa Troopas — green/red/blue/yellow palette × shell/nonshell variants + Masked Koopa Mario-hider. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Koopa Troopas — green/red/blue/yellow palette × shell/nonshell variants + Masked Koopa Mario-hider
